search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: How to Start Mountain Biking 1 Get an appropriately-sized mountain bike. Your bike should match your height, body type, and the length of your leg. If a bike doesn’t fit you well, then it will be uncomfortable and inefficient to ride. A good bike shop will be able to set you up with a bike specific to your needs. [1] Many will
Decision_Reason: The page is about starting mountain biking and bike fitting, not about improving sports performance in general. It is only somewhat related to the query rather than strongly relevant.
